allow: Bash(powershell -Command ".\\.specify\\scripts\\powershell\\create-new-feature.ps1 -Description ''''Phase 2: Autonomous Discovery - Extend SignalFlow to autonomously discover relevant content from web search, YouTube, and Twitter APIs using MCP integrations and subagents for parallel retrieval and semantic deduplication. Removes manual content curation requirement while maintaining MVP quality standards. Target timeline: 2-3 weeks after MVP validation.'''' -Json -ShortName ''''autonomous-discovery'''' ''''Autonomous Content Discovery''''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1 -Json -ShortName 'skill-invocation-layer' 'invocation layer for the skill. add clear entrypoint and optional snippets into a single payload orchestrator and helper scripts both use'")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1 ''source manifest output. write a sidecar JSON or yaml file with all discovered sources, credibility score, dedup decisions and section selections. that makes the digest auditable and much easier to debug'' -Json -ShortName ''source-manifest'' ''Source Manifest Output''")

Bash(pwsh .specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1 "Digest validation: add a post write validator that checks section counts, required evidence, broken formatting, and low signal warnings" -Json -ShortName "post-write-validator")

Bash(powershell.exe -File ".specify/scripts/powershell/create-new-feature.ps1" "Digest validation: add a post write validator that checks section counts, required evidence, broken formatting, and low signal warnings" -Json -ShortName "post-write-validator" 2>&1)
